subcodes.first_line: O kind friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! When the esteemed Áqá Siyyid Jalál arrived from those regions, possessed of the power of faith [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان عبدالبهاء جناب آقا سید جلال چون از آن صفحات وارد از قوه ایمان
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @growth of the Cause, @martyrs and martyrdom, @living waters; water of life
